subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My Glory! The letter of the honoured Hasan-Áqá that was written unto thee, as well as his petition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه جناب حسن آقا که بانجناب نوشته و هم چنین عریضه اش
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
